title: nlink-lab spawn --json output
description: Emitted on stdout (one object) by `nlink-lab spawn --json` after the child has been created. Per-process stdout/stderr live at `$XDG_STATE_HOME/nlink-lab/labs/<lab>/logs/<node>-<basename>-<pid>.{stdout,stderr}` (default `~/.local/state`).

command.description: Space-joined argv as passed to spawn (post --env interpolation).

pid.description: Linux PID of the child. Equal to host_pid today.

host_pid.description: Explicit alias for pid: host-side PID. Equal to pid today because nlink-lab does not use CLONE_NEWPID (host_pid == ns_pid). See ARCHITECTURE.md 'Process & namespace model'. The field exists so consumers that explicitly want 'the host PID' can name it; if a future nlink-lab adds CLONE_NEWPID, an ns_pid field will join host_pid.
